## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Follows the project conventions (exact-pinned versions, no TS parameter
      properties in `server/`, ESM `.ts` import extensions, tests-first,
      conventional-commit messages) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If config or widgets changed, `config.example.yaml` and the docs are updated
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private infrastructure details are included
